'''Oochee''' was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] from the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. He lived in [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] and fought with spears against the Empire.<ref name="EBP" /> Oochee was named for a [[Oochee (legend)|child]] from Ewok mythology.<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Oochee is an action figure in a [[Hasbro]] battle pack released in [[2007]].<ref name="EBP" /> The action figure is composed of a repainted [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] body and a [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket W. Warrick]] hood from a [[1997]] Hasbro two-pack.<ref name="EBP" /><ref name="POTF">{{KennerCite|set=Star Wars: The Power of the Force (1995 toy line)|pack=Ewoks: Wicket & Logray|link=POTF2ewoks.asp}}</ref> Previously, the name was used in a role-playing game supplement, listing popular Ewok names and their origins.<ref name="GCG" />

The battle pack also includes an Ewok named Wicket W. Warrick, although the coloring resembles that of [[Widdle Warrick/Legends|Widdle Warrick]], his brother.<ref name="EBP" /><ref name="COC">''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]''</ref> Together, the dark-furred Oochee and the light-furred Wicket W. Warrick resemble the Ewoks who help [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] commandeer an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]] in the [[1983]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="EBP" /><ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref> However, a later Hasbro release has instead identified that dark-furred Ewok as [[Wunka/Legends|Wunka]].<ref name="ES">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: The Vintage Collection|packtype=Special Action Figure Set|pack=Ewok Scouts|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/Ewok_Scouts_The_Vintage_Collection_TVC_Kmart.asp}}</ref>
